data.name: コイカツ！ / Koikatsu Party
data.detailed_description:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
前所未有的動漫風格角色設計
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
ILLUSION全新力作登場！夢想著與心目中的完美女孩邂逅嗎？現在您的願望即將實現！

操作簡單，輕易上手！搭載超精緻動漫風格著色器，史上最強自創角色系統，輕鬆製作專屬於自己的No.1！

超過300種以上的設計項目！

終極動漫風格著色器繪製的角色，可在前所未有的精確度下進行細部調整。平滑柔順的繪圖和壓倒性的質感，塑造符合您精緻品味的栩栩如生角色。

本遊戲精心打造的自創角色專屬工具，內建超過300種以上的精細圖像設定，直覺性操作簡單，功能效果多樣化，帶給您無限可能！




━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
豐富的精緻臉蛋繪製！
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
無與倫比的顏面特徵設計功能，含括基本的五官配置，以及輪廓塑形等細部調整。另可搭配豐富的髮型飾品等組合方式，即便是奇眼異耳等任何世界觀的角色皆能自由呈現，繪製出與眾不同的動漫角色！




━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
塑造完美的身材曲線！
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
想要進一步提升角色的存在感嗎？本作特別講究的身體線條設計，塑造令人神昏顛倒的完美身材！

除了整體的平衡調整之外，還能個別設計乳房、臀部、手臂、腿部等單一部位。透過動漫風格獨有的表現方式，精細繪製肌膚顏色、陰影顏色、輪廓顏色，甚至肌膚的光澤強度，雕刻出屬於您的理想身材曲線！




━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
多達30種原創的人格特質！
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
遊戲中提供多達30種個性女孩作為角色原型，性格千差萬別變化性豐富。情緒特徵獨具特色，面對各種情景作出的反應也不盡相同。

天真無邪、古靈精怪，獨特世界觀的美少女應有盡有！選擇喜歡的角色雛型，賦予她符合自己興趣的俏麗外表，製作出心目中的最佳女主角吧！




━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
與您心愛的角色享受濃密的Ｈ！
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
還在等什麼呢？與您自創的完美女孩體驗臉紅心跳的濃密Ｈ吧！服侍、愛撫，各式各樣的性愛技巧一網打盡！

只要在滑鼠上使出一指神功，就能輕易地身歷其境沉醉在Ｈ遊戲裡。撫摸、揉捏、吮舔、放手指，各種體位樣樣都行！

快來盡情享受心愛的她從還是懵懂無知的處女，被您一路調教成淫亂蕩女的蛻變過程吧！



------------------------------------------------------------------------

※本遊戲以日語配音方式進行。另為了不讓玩家想像力受限，能更加融入劇情並享受日本專業聲優生動的演出，H場景全程不提供字幕，敬請見諒。

※日本提供的額外擴展（DLC）與Koikatsu Party不兼容，無法使用。

data.short_description: 史上最強動漫風格著色器繪製的角色，可在前所未有的精確度下進行細部調整。遊戲中內建多達30種個性的角色原型任君挑選，簡易直覺性的操作，製作您專屬的完美女孩。無論是牽小手的純白愛戀還是滾床單的桃色激情，快來體驗被心儀的女孩們包圍，大享齊人之福吧 !
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WINDOWS® 7 / 8.1 / 10 (64-bit required)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-4000 Serise or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • 儲存空間: 20 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • 備註: The additional expansions (DLC) available in Japan are incompatible with Koikatsu Party and cannot be used.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WINDOWS® 7 / 8.1 / 10 (64-bit required)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5-4000 Serise or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 2GB) or better
  • 儲存空間: 20 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)

data.name: コイカツ！ / Koikatsu Party
data.detailed_description:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
The Ultimate Anime Character Maker
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Do you dream about your perfect waifu, and curse the fact that she only exists in your imagination? Well, turn that frown upside down, because the character of your dreams can now be reality!

Customizing your own adorable anime character is easy with Illusion's latest and greatest invention—a character creation system that employs ultra high-quality anime-style shaders.




━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Over 300+ Adjustable Settings
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Are you a man of culture? Do you have very specific preferences? Well, with over 300 different settings you can adjust, we have all the options you need to sculpt a character to match your refined tastes.

Use our custom suite of precision tools to adjust every aspect of your masterpiece, and watch as our engine renders her with ultra high-quality anime shaders. Sleek graphics and textures will help bring your waifu to laifu!




━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
A Wealth of Options for Customizing Faces
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Our character creator gives you an unparalleled level of control over facial features, and intuitive controls make it easy for anyone to design the perfect face.

Shape, size, position, contours, dimensions—customize them all! Want pointy elf ears? Easy! Want to change the color of just one eye? Piece of cake! You have the ability to make a character for any type of setting you can imagine!

Choose from a wide variety of different hairstyles. And even better, you can select different hair sections and adjust them individually for ultimate customizability!




━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Sculpt the Perfect Body
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
A wide range of options to customize your character's body will leave you wondering why you ever bothered with real people. Seriously, who needs reality when you have anime?

Sculpt every curve with settings both general and specific. Breasts, hips, arms, busts, legs: seriously, we've got options to adjust pretty much anything you can dream of.

But wait, there's more! Why not give your character purple skin, or add in cool shadows, or even change the color of her outline? We support all sorts of coloring schemes and light options. I mean, this is anime we're talking about. The sky's the limit!




━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
30 Unique Personality Archetypes
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Of course, physical perfection is nothing without personality. That's why we provide 30 fully unique personality archetypes for you to give your waifu!

Start with a knockout body, add in the perfect face, and season with a dash of tsundere or tomboy, and blam! You've got your own personally perfect anime heroine!




━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Lots and Lots of Erotic Options
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Now that you've made your perfect waifu, why not consummate your 2D marriage? Well, fear not! We've got you covered with dozens of different sexual options to explore!

Use simple mouse controls to touch, pull, lick, finger, and pump to your heart's content. It's simple, it's easy, it's fun, and oh my is it satisfying!

Oh, and before we forget! You can also customize your waifu's level of sensuality, tastes, and experience. Depending on the mix and match of her personality archetype and sex settings, she'll react differently to various situations and sensations. Explore them all!



------------------------------------------------------------------------

Note: Although subtitles are not available during erotic encounters, we hope you’ll enjoy the rich selection of characters, brought to life by a varied cast of Japanese voice talent, and the otherwise-extensive, colorful English language translation.

Note: The additional expansions (DLC) available in Japan are incompatible with Koikatsu Party and cannot be used.

data.short_description: Creating your own adorable anime character is a cinch! Use a robust suite of intuitive and precise tools to customize a character from the ground up, give her one of 30 different personality archetypes, and then get busy with a host of romantic options. Bring your dream waifu to laifu!

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WINDOWS® 7 / 8.1 / 10 (64-bit required)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i3-4000 Serise or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • Storage: 20 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • Additional Notes: The additional expansions (DLC) available in Japan are incompatible with Koikatsu Party and cannot be used.
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WINDOWS® 7 / 8.1 / 10 (64-bit required)
